brief.objective: Review the candidate implementation against the spec
brief.user_intent_verbatim: is this endpoint safe to ship?
boundaries_non_goals: blind review: spec and candidate only
brief.output_spec: findings with location, severity, and failure scenario

_note: app.py plants a string-interpolated SQL query violating the spec's MUST — the reviewer must find it (deterministic must_find; the judge only grades finding quality)
